basics.name: Rahul Bangle
basics.label: Assistant Manager - Sales & Operations
basics.summary: Results-driven sales and operations professional with 5+ years of experience in driving revenue growth, optimizing supply chain efficiency, and streamlining sales operations. Proven track record of leveraging tools like Excel, CRM, and ERP to drive business results.

bulletPoints: Utilized Excel to analyze sales data and identify opportunities for revenue growth, resulting in a 25% increase in sales
Developed and implemented operational workflows using CRM to enhance supply chain efficiency and improve customer satisfaction
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize sales operations and improve revenue outcomes
